pageDescription: Calculate car loan payments and total cost including interest, sales tax, and fees for new and used vehicle financing

components.title: Auto Loan Components
components.description: Principal, Interest, Sales Tax, and Additional Fees

amortization.title: Amortization
amortization.description: Early payments are mostly interest; later payments are mostly principal

depreciation.title: Vehicle Depreciation
depreciation.description: Cars lose value over time, affecting loan-to-value ratio

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides auto loan payment estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual loan terms may vary based on lender policies, credit score, and vehicle factors

importantNotesList: This is an estimate and does not include all possible fees and charges
New cars depreciate quickly, potentially leaving you upside-down on the loan
Shorter loan terms typically have lower interest rates but higher monthly payments
Consider total cost of ownership including insurance, maintenance, and fuel

messages.enterInformation: Enter your auto loan information to calculate monthly payments
messages.resultMessage: Your auto loan calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides auto loan payment estimates based on standard financial formulas. Actual loan terms, payments, and interest may vary based on lender policies, credit score, vehicle condition, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized auto loan advice and financing options, consult auto loan specialists or financial advisors with expertise in vehicle financing and individual financial circumstances.

errors.vehiclePrice: Please enter a valid vehicle price
errors.downPayment: Please enter a valid down payment
errors.loanAmount: Please enter a valid loan amount
errors.interestRate: Please enter a valid annual interest rate
errors.loanTerm: Please enter a valid loan term
errors.startDate: Please enter a valid loan start date
errors.salesTax: Please enter a valid sales tax rate
errors.tradeIn: Please enter a valid trade-in value

tooltips.downPayment: Amount paid upfront toward the vehicle purchase
tooltips.downPaymentType: Whether down payment is specified as amount or percentage
tooltips.interestRate: Annual interest rate on the auto loan
tooltips.loanTerm: Length of time to repay the loan (typically 36-84 months)
tooltips.salesTax: State and local sales tax on vehicle purchase
tooltips.fees: Additional fees such as documentation, title, and registration fees
tooltips.tradeIn: Value of your current vehicle used as down payment

include_taxes_and_fees_in_loan_14: Include taxes and fees in loan
include_taxes_and_fees_in_loan_27: Include taxes and fees in loan
find_average_tax_rate_and_fees_in_your_s: Find Average Tax Rate and Fees in Your State
enter_auto_loan_details_to_see_your_paym: Enter auto loan details to see your payment breakdown
